package rulecoverage

func PositiveMalformedStructTag() string {
    ruleID := "malformed_struct_tag"
    family := "consistency"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Struct field tags that do not parse as valid Go tag key/value pairs."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
